ambiguity_risks: A reader may import an unstated service capability; option evaluation is limited to the explicit constraints and approved claims.
A broadly workable alternative must still fail at least one explicit requirement.
expected_keyed_answer_properties: Satisfies every explicit material requirement and constraint.
Uses only behavior supported by the listed approved claims.
Wins under the stated minimum-operational-overhead prioritizer.

material_constraints.description: The required Regions, including any applicable opt-in home Region, are enabled.
The trail is configured for the required event categories.
The configured organization trail's delivery prerequisites have been validated.

material_requirements.description: Cover configured events in management and member accounts.
Automatically include accounts that join the organization.
Prevent member-account administrators from altering or deleting the central trail.

originality_notes: Constructed from the accepted design theme and approved atomic claims without copying an exam guide, sample question, question bank, or live-exam expression.
Scenario nouns, requirement combination, option order, and explanatory wording are original to this project.
scenario_theme: Choose centrally managed CloudTrail evidence for existing and joining accounts with explicit Region conditions.
